Description: Fixed pixel widths do not adapt to different screen sizes causing horizontal scroll or wasted space
Do: Use fluid layouts with max-width constraints and responsive breakpoints
Don't: Hardcode pixel widths that break on different screens

Description: Single column or rigid layouts waste space on large screens and break on small ones
Do: Use CSS Grid or Flexbox with responsive column counts
Don't: Fixed column layouts that do not adapt

Description: Text lines that span full viewport width on large screens are hard to read
Do: Constrain content width to 65-75 characters for readability
Don't: Allow content to stretch infinitely wide

Description: Arbitrary z-index values cause layering bugs with modals tooltips and dropdowns
Do: Use systematic z-index scale and proper stacking contexts
Don't: Random z-index values competing for top layer

Description: 100vh on mobile includes browser chrome causing content to be cut off
Do: Use dvh or JavaScript-based viewport height for mobile
Don't: Rely on 100vh for full-screen mobile layouts

Description: Oversized sticky headers waste valuable screen real estate
Do: Keep headers compact consider hiding on scroll down
Don't: Large headers that stay visible taking up space

Description: Desktop headers with many items do not work on mobile screens
Do: Collapse to hamburger or bottom nav on mobile show only essential items
Don't: <Header>{isMobile ? <MobileNav /> : <DesktopNav />}</Header>

Description: Keyboard users must tab through entire header on every page
Do: Add skip to main content link as first focusable element
Don't: No skip link forcing navigation through header

Description: Fixed or sticky footers on mobile block content and reduce usable space
Do: Use static footers that scroll with content on mobile
Don't: Persistent footer bars taking up mobile screen space

Description: Footers without expected links like terms privacy and contact seem unprofessional
Do: Include legal links contact sitemap and social in footer
Don't: Minimal footer missing expected legal and contact links

Description: Sidebars that cannot collapse waste space and obscure content on smaller screens
Do: Make sidebars collapsible or hidden on mobile
Don't: Permanent sidebar that cannot be minimized

Description: Sidebars that scroll independently cause confusing scroll behavior
Do: Handle sidebar scroll carefully consider sticky positioning
Don't: Independent scroll causing dual scrollbar confusion

Description: Modals that appear at strange positions are disorienting
Do: Center modals vertically and horizontally in viewport
Don't: Modals appearing at top or off-center

Description: Modals without click-outside-to-close violate user expectations
Do: Allow clicking backdrop to close modals
Don't: Force users to find and click X button only

Description: Modals that cannot be closed with Escape key frustrate keyboard users
Do: Close modals on Escape key press
Don't: Ignore escape key for modal dismissal

Description: Modals without focus trap allow tabbing to hidden content behind
Do: Trap focus inside modal until closed
Don't: Tab navigates to content behind modal

Description: After closing modal focus should return to trigger element
Do: Return focus to element that opened modal
Don't: Focus lost after modal closes
Code Example Good: const triggerRef = useRef(); onClose={() => { close(); triggerRef.current.focus(); }}

Description: Dropdowns that extend beyond viewport edges are cut off or unusable
Do: Auto-position dropdowns to flip when near edges
Don't: Fixed positioning ignoring viewport boundaries

Description: Dropdowns that stay open when clicking elsewhere are annoying
Do: Close dropdowns on click outside
Don't: Dropdown stays open until explicit close
Code Example Bad: // must click button again to close

Description: Dropdowns without arrow key navigation exclude keyboard users
Do: Support arrow keys for navigation Enter for selection
Don't: Mouse only dropdown interaction

Description: Form inputs without associated labels are inaccessible
Do: Connect labels to inputs with htmlFor and id
Don't: Labels that do not connect to inputs

Description: Forms that do not submit on Enter break user expectations
Do: Wrap form fields in form tag with onSubmit handler
Don't: Div wrapper preventing enter submission

Description: Missing autocomplete attributes prevent browser autofill
Do: Add appropriate autocomplete attributes for common fields
Don't: <input type="email" autoComplete="email" />

Description: Pages that do not restore scroll position on back navigation frustrate users
Do: Handle scroll restoration for SPA navigation
Don't: Reset to top on every navigation

Description: Anchor links that do not scroll to target are confusing
Do: Ensure anchor links scroll to target element smoothly
Don't: Hash links that do nothing

Description: Infinite scroll that cannot be escaped traps users
Do: Provide way to access footer or switch to pagination
Don't: Footer unreachable due to infinite scroll

Description: Images loading eagerly waste bandwidth and slow page load
Do: Lazy load below-fold images eagerly load above-fold
Don't: <Image loading="lazy" /> // below fold <Image priority /> // hero

Description: Images without dimensions cause layout shift as they load
Do: Specify width and height or use aspect-ratio
Don't: Images that shift content when loading

Description: Custom fonts without fallbacks show flash or invisible text
Do: Specify fallback fonts that closely match custom font
Don't: font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;

Description: Fonts that block rendering cause blank text during load
Do: Use font-display swap and preload critical fonts
Don't: @font-face { font-display: swap; } <link rel="preload" href="font.woff2" as="font">
